zh.lifeSummary: 當Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn於1280年出生在波蘭希利a斯吉波維亞特 卡托維其吉時，他的父親Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn28歲，母親Grzymisława Duchess of Opole19歲。他於大約1324年8月19日之前與Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年9月29日在波蘭可拉可福斯吉希享年78歲，埋葬在波蘭可拉可福斯吉希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn于1280年出生在波兰希利a斯吉波維亞特 卡托維其吉时，他的父亲Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn28岁，母亲Grzymisława Duchess of Opole19岁。他于大约1324年8月19日之前与Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年9月29日在波兰可拉可福斯吉希享年78岁，埋葬在波兰可拉可福斯吉希。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

en.lifeSummary: When Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn was born in 1280, in Katowice County, Silesia, Poland, his father, Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn, was 28 and his mother, Grzymisława Duchess of Opole, was 19. He married Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw before about 19 August 1324. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 29 September 1358, in Cieszyn, Kraków, Poland, at the age of 78, and was buried in Cieszyn, Kraków, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn est né en 1280, à Powiat katowicki, śląskie, Pologne, son père, Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Grzymisława Duchess of Opole, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw avant environ 19 août 1324. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1358, à Cieszyn, krakowskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Cieszyn, krakowskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn 1280 in Powiat katowicki, śląskie, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn 28 und seine Mutter Grzymisława Duchess of Opole 19. Er hat vor um 19. August 1324 Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1358 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Cieszyn, Krakau, Polen und wurde in Cieszyn, Krakau, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn è nato il nel 1280 nel Powiat katowicki, śląskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Grzymisława Duchess of Opole, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw prima del circa 19 agosto 1324. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1358, nel Cieszyn, krakowskie, Polonia, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Cieszyn, krakowskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Duke Casimir I of Cieszynが1280年にポーランドsルaスキポウィアト カトウィクイで生まれた時，父Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszynは28歳，母Grzymisława Duchess of Opoleは19歳であった。約1324年8月19日以前にDuchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsawと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年9月29日にポーランドクラコウスキシエスズインで78歳で死去し，ポーランドクラコウスキシエスズインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn(이)가 1280년 폴란드 sa스키 파위앳 카타윅이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Grzymisława Duchess of Opole(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1324년 8월 19일 이전 Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 9월 29일 폴란드 크라코우스키 시스즈이에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 크라코우스키 시스즈이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn nasceu em 1280, em Powiat katowicki, śląskie, Polônia, seu pai, Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Grzymisława Duchess of Opole, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw antes aproximadamente 19 de agosto de 1324. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1358, em Cieszyn, krakowskie, Polônia, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Cieszyn, krakowskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn родился в 1280 г. в местности поуят катоуикки, sлaски, Польша, его отцу по имени Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Grzymisława Duchess of Opole, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw перед около 19 августа 1324 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 29 сентября 1358 г. в местности сиесзин, кракоуски, Польша в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности сиесзин, кракоуски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn nació en 1280, en Powiat katowicki, śląskie, Polonia, su papá, Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Grzymisława Duchess of Opole, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw antes de aproximadamente 19 de agosto de 1324. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1358, en Cieszyn, krakowskie, Polonia, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Cieszyn, krakowskie, Polonia.
